blocks.text: Welcome to CUHK-Shenzhen! Prof. Chen loves to send greetings using strings consisting only of lowercase English letters.
Given an integer n, construct a string consisting only of lowercase English letters such that the sum of the ASCII codes of its characters is equal to n.

There are multiple test cases. The first line of the input contains an integer T (1 ≤ T ≤ 5×10³ ), indicating the number of test cases. For each test case: The only line contains an integer n (1 ≤ n ≤ 10⁷ ). It is guaranteed that the sum of n over all test cases does not exceed 10⁷ .

items: If it is possible to construct a string consisting only of lowercase English letters whose ASCII sum is equal to n, first output Yes in one line. Then output a second line containing such a string.
Otherwise, if it is impossible to do so, just output No in one line.

blocks.text: Below is the ASCII code table for lowercase English letters:
Letter ASCII Letter ASCII Letter ASCII a 97 j 106 s 115 b 98 k 107 t 116 c 99 l 108 u 117 d 100 m 109 v 118 e 101 n 110 w 119 f 102 o 111 x 120 g 103 p 112 y 121 h 104 q 113 z 122 i 105 r 114
欢迎来到香港中文大学（深圳）！陈教授喜欢用仅由小写英文字母组成的字符串发送问候。给定一个整数 n，构造一个仅由小写英文字母组成的字符串，使字符的 ASCII 码之和恰好等于 n。
有多组测试数据。第一行输入一个整数 T（1 ≤ T ≤ 5 × 10³），表示测试数据组数。对于每组测试数据：仅有的一行输入一个整数 n（1 ≤ n ≤ 10⁷）。保证所有测试数据中 n 的总和不超过 10⁷。

items: 如果可以构造出一个仅由小写英文字母组成、且其 ASCII 码之和等于 n 的字符串，则首先在一行中输出 Yes，然后在第二行输出这样一个字符串。
否则，如果无法构造这样的字符串，则仅在一行中输出 No。

blocks.text: 以下是小写英文字母的 ASCII 码对照表：字母 ASCII 字母 ASCII 字母 ASCII a 97 j 106 s 115 b 98 k 107 t 116 c 99 l 108 u 117 d 100 m 109 v 118 e 101 n 110 w 119 f 102 o 111 x 120 g 103 p 112 y 121 h 104 q 113 z 122 i 105 r 114
